item.title: Why We Need Science and FDA Regulations
item.description: Thalodomide In Europe and Canada in the late 1950s and early 1960s, the sedative thalidomide was routinely given to pregnant women, resulting in children being born with severe birth defects such as missing limbs. The United States, however, did not approve the drug and kept it off store shelves, as a result of the efforts of Canadian-born Dr. Frances Kelsey, who worked for the United States Food and Drug Administration. Her advice to people in similar situations is this: “Just stick to your guns.” She said, “I just held my ground. I wouldn’t approve it.” Over 100 children in Canada suffered severe birth defects because of thalidomide. Mercédes Benegbi, head of The Thalidomide Victims Association of Canada, said, “She was an example of rigour. It’s as if we were wimps in Canada. On the basis of the same data, we said everything was perfect, while it was unacceptable in the U.S. Someone here didn’t do their job.” After receiving her undergraduate and master’s degrees in science at McGill University in Montreal, Ms. Kelsey applied for a job as a research assistant at the University of Chicago, and she received an acceptance letter that addressed her as “Mr.” She said, “To this day, I do not know if my name had been Elizabeth or Mary Jane, whether I would have gotten that first big step up.” She got a medical degree, worked for a while at the American Medical Association Journal, and took a job at the FDA in Washington D.C. In 1960, after she had been working at the FDA for only a month, she was given the task of deciding whether or not to approve thalidomide, which had been used in Europe for years and was made by U.S. drug-maker William S. Merrell Co. of Cincinnati, for use in the U.S. Dr. Kelsey said, “They figured it was so popular in Europe, so I would be a pushover.” But information about the safety of the drug was lacking. She said, “The information as presented was very sketchy.” She added, “The company wasn’t happy with me. They thought I was being pretty stubborn. They just wanted to sell their drug.” Representatives of the drug company kept trying to persuade her to approve the drug. She said, “I just didn’t like it from the start. It was just too overblown. And they didn’t have any evidence to submit. They were so sure it was good because of its popularity in England. They couldn’t understand what I was fussing about.” She did not approve the drug, and soon reports of birth defects linked to the drug began coming from Europe, and European countries began to ban the drug. In 1962, President John F. Kennedy gave her the President’s Award for Distinguished Federal Civilian Service. She said, “It was a lovely day, and he was very handsome.” In 2010, the FDA named a prize after her. President Barack Obama also sent this message to her: “Our country relies on dedicated public servants like Dr. Kelsey to create a better, healthier future for our children and grandchildren.” Best of all, she kept many children from being born with severe birth defects. Source: Ingrid Peritz, “Canadian doctor averted disaster by keeping thalidomide out of the U.S.” The Globe and Mail (Toronto, Ontario, Canada). 24 November 2014 . “Frances Kathleen Oldham Kelsey CM (née Oldham; July 24, 1914 – August 7, 2015) was a Canadian-American pharmacologist and physician. As a reviewer for the U.S. Food and Drug Administration(FDA), she refused to authorize thalidomide for market because she had concerns about the lack of evidence regarding the drug's safety. Her concerns proved to be justified when it was shown that thalidomide caused serious birth defects. Kelsey's career intersected with the passage of laws strengthening FDA oversight of pharmaceuticals. Kelsey was the second woman to receive the President's Award for Distinguished Federal Civilian Service, awarded to her by John F. Kennedy in 1962.” https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Frances_Oldham_Kelsey Thalidomide scandal “In the late 1950s and early 1960s, the use of thalidomide in 46 countries was prescribed to women who were pregnant or who subsequently became pregnant, and consequently resulted in the "biggest anthropogenic medical disaster ever," with more than 10,000 children born with a range of severe deformities, such as phocomelia, as well as thousands of miscarriages.” https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Thalidomide_scandal Photo: “Feet of a baby born to a mother who had taken thalidomide while pregnant” By Not specified at the source. Uploaded to flickr by Otis Historical Archives National Museum of Health and Medicine. - NCP14053, CC BY 2.0, https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=4247382 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/2.0/ CONTENT CONTROLS “Content Controls will allow you to see fewer posts from certain topics or tags while you browse Imgur.” https://help.imgur.com/hc/en-us/articles/26509094934171-Content-Controls HOW DO I MUTE OR BLOCK AN IMGUR USER? https://help.imgur.com/hc/en-us/articles/26508943104667-How-do-I-mute-or-block-a-user# BRIAN TYLER COHEN: FIGHTING THE GOOD FIGHT https://www.youtube.com/@briantylercohen https://bsky.app/profile/briantylercohen.bsky.social GLENN KIRSCHNER: FIGHTING THE GOOD FIGHT (JUSTICE MATTERS) https://www.youtube.com/@GlennKirschner2 https://bsky.app/profile/glennkirschner.bsky.social MARC ELIAS: FIGHTING THE GOOD FIGHT (DEMOCRACY DOCKET) https://www.youtube.com/c/DemocracyDocket https://bsky.app/profile/marcelias.bsky.social ANDREW TOBIAS: FIGHTING THE GOOD FIGHT https://andrewtobias.com ROBERT REICH: FIGHTING THE GOOD FIGHT https://www.youtube.com/@RBReich ANNA FROM URAINE: UKRAINE NEWS https://www.youtube.com/@AnnafromUkraine PROFESSOR GERDES EXPLAINS: UKRAINE NEWS https://www.youtube.com/@Professor-Gerdes THE REAL NEWS NETWORK https://therealnews.com DOCTORS WITHOUT BORDERS https://www.doctorswithoutborders.org/what-we-do/where-we-work/palestine UNITED24 (UNITED FOR UKRAINE): AN OFFICIAL WEBSITE OF THE UKRAINIAN GOVERNMENT Donations are deductible to the full extent allowable under IRS regulations. UNITED24 is registered in the USA as a 501c3 organization by the Embassy of Ukraine. https://u24.gov.ua UKRAINE FACT SHEET: How You Can Help Ukraine (USA Gov Website) https://travel.state.gov/content/travel/en/News/Intercountry-Adoption-News/ukraine---fact-sheet--how-you-can-help.html UKRAINE SUPPORT TRACKER A Database of Military, Financial and Humanitarian Aid to Ukraine https://www.ifw-kiel.de/topics/war-against-ukraine/ukraine-support-tracker/ LESSONS FROM TIM SNYDER ON TYRANNY https://imgur.com/gallery/thread-lessons-from-tim-snyder-s-on-tyranny-because-while-you-may-have-no-interest-authoritarians-they-have-interest-you-8svGv7A#/user/oukid/favorites Institute on Taxation on Economic Policy): Tax Payments by Undocumented Immigrants (30 July 2024) “Undocumented immigrants paid $96.7 billion in federal, state, and local taxes in 2022. Most of that amount, $59.4 billion, was paid to the federal government while the remaining $37.3 billion was paid to state and local governments.” https://itep.org/undocumented-immigrants-taxes-2024/ Pete Seeger: “If I Had a Hammer” (A Progressive Anthem) https://youtu.be/076UYdfg3es Bon Jovi: “It’s My Life” (Gay Rights) https://youtu.be/1v9ZOcIRn-I The Local Girls: “Three Little Words” (Lesbian Love) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ycZYhLt3FHM The Local Girls: “I’m Into Something Good” (Lesbian Love) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4ND_3iTD6Go Sad Bastards of Brooklyn: “Somewhere Over the Rainbow” (A Song for Ukraine) https://youtu.be/QnEoAkzIxYY Richard Grosser: “Ukraine: National Anthem” https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HqB3eBlXv3M The Last Noelle: “The Rainbow Connection” (Gay Rights) https://youtu.be/2r3E_dyzL20 Billie Holiday: “God Bless the Child” https://youtu.be/7i5AWwXJDoM Joan Baez: “We Shall Overcome” https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CNX4I1tqhfw Billie Holiday: “Strange Fruit” https://youtu.be/tN8inUDdgC0 Caitlin Kraus: “This Body” (Women’s Rights) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EW9Kp-P3oio Paula Lockheart: “Sweet Marijuana Brown” (Blues) https://youtu.be/kbG8qq14Vz0 Zoe FitzGerald Carter: “I Wanna Be a Teenage Boy” (Brett Kavanaugh) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-RDZ1Fyw1ks https://zoefcarter.bandcamp.com/track/i-wanna-be-a-teenage-boy Shaun Theron: “Mithridates” (Life Advice: Prepare for Evil) https://youtu.be/tIZaklU8Po4 Shaun Theron: “Mithridates” (Line Drawings) (Life Advice: Prepare for Evil) https://youtu.be/NXqdykYCRbs FRANK ZAPPA BEING PRESCIENT (45 seconds) https://www.instagram.com/reel/DEN7FQXSWsi/?igsh=MnphMWFqbzQ0aDFz Sinclair Lewis: IT CAN’T HAPPEN HERE: PUBLIC DOMAIN IN CANADA (Free Download) https://imgur.com/gallery/what-will-happen-when-usa-has-dictator-gg9sZWW https://www.fadedpage.com/showbook.php?pid=20171242 https://resistir.info/livros/s_lewis_it_cant_happen_here.pdf George Orwell: 1984 (Free Download) https://www.globalgreyebooks.com/nineteen-eighty-four-ebook.html FREE eBook: DANTE’S DIVINE COMEDY: A RETELLING IN PROSE https://www.smashwords.com/books/view/238180 The Book of Good Deeds 1914-1918 Collected and Edited with a Foreword by Bernhard Diebold TRANSLATED BY HELLMUT AND LETITIA LEHMANN-HAUPT (PDF) https://web.seducoahuila.gob.mx/biblioweb/upload/bernhard-diebold-s-the-book-of-good-deeds-1914-1918%20(1).pdf SOME SOURCES FOR FREE EBOOKS http://johnstoniatexts.x10host.com (Many FREE Downloadable Translations) https://www.poetryintranslation.com (Many FREE Downloadable Translations) https://www.globalgreyebooks.com https://www.gutenberg.org https://www.fadedpage.com https://freeditorial.com https://www.classicallibrary.org/index.htm https://www.planetebook.com https://onlinebooks.library.upenn.edu https://www.exclassics.com https://standardebooks.org https://www.wikibooks.org CHECK TO SEE IF A SITE IS SAFE Google’s Safe Browsing technology examines billions of URLs per day looking for unsafe websites. Every day, we discover thousands of new unsafe sites, many of which are legitimate websites that have been compromised. When we detect unsafe sites, we show warnings on Google Search and in web browsers. You can search to see whether a website is currently dangerous to visit. https://transparencyreport.google.com/safe-browsing/search

item.title: Interesting Movie Details. :)
item.description:
In Wonder Woman (2017), Diana is able to get to London from her remote island in only a day because she is an Amazon, and therefore qualifies for next day shipping.
In Man Of Steel (2013) Jonathan Kent chooses to die in a completely nonsensical and avoidable way, by staying in an active tornado storm. That's because he knew that the alternative would be appearing in Batman v Superman: Dawn of Justice (2016).
In X Men:The Last Stand, Jean Grey is shown to be 12 years old in 1986. Therefore, in X Men:Apocalypse, which is set in 1983, Jean Grey should be 9 years old. The 9 year old Jean is shown above.
In Batman V Superman, in order to defeat a god who has super strength, laser eyes and can fly, Bruce Wayne does pull ups.
In Avengers: Endgame (2019), Scarlet Johansson throws herself off a cliff so she doesn’t have to be part of the girl power scene
In Morbius (2022) the main characters uses their wolf form to win an arm wrestle competition for control of New Jersey, this is a reference to the fact no one can prove me wrong, because no one’s seen this movie.
in Watchmen (2009) a graffiti reads "Who watches the Watchmen?" this is a reference to me, as I am currently watching Watchmen
In Wonder Woman 1984, Steve is amazed by an escalator despite them being commonly used in stores by the time he died in 1918. This is a reference to how bad the script is.
In Titanic (1997) Rose throws a 250 Million Dollar necklace in the ocean, in memory of that 1 night stand she had 80 years ago. This is a reference to how few fucks she gives about the children she has had since then, who might appreciate the inheritance. #funny #movies Movie Details Part 1: https://imgur.com/gallery/NazGeuS

item.dc:creator: mocosoft

item.title: Confessions of a concerned bird
item.description: https://theconcernedbird.substack.com/p/elon-musks-and-xs-role-in-2024-election?triedRedirect=true 1/10/2025 To Whom It May Concern, I'm writing this with a heavy heart and no small amount of fear. As a former X (formerly Twitter) employee on an H1B visa, I can't reveal my identity without risking everything, but I can't stay silent any longer about what I saw and was made to do. When Elon Musk took over, everything changed. What started as a social media company became something much darker. I was part of a team that was directly ordered to manipulate Twitter's systems to influence the 2024 US presidential election. It wasn't subtle, and it wasn't ethical. We completely changed how the algorithm worked, pushing pro-Trump and right-wing posts to the top of people's feeds. To make it look balanced, we also boosted some left-wing critics of Democrats, but it was all carefully calculated. These changes didn't just affect Americans - they impacted users worldwide. One of the most disturbing things we did was create thousands of fake accounts using advanced AI systems called Grok and Eliza. These accounts looked completely real and pushed political messages that spread like wildfire. Havn't you noticed they all disappeared? Like magic. We also knowingly allowed foreign governments to manipulate the platform. State-backed groups from Israel, Iran, and Russia were running their own influence campaigns, and because their goals aligned with ours, we looked the other way. Even when they clearly broke the rules, we didn't stop them. Perhaps the most unethical part was how we manufactured news stories. One team would write completely fake articles, while another team would artificially boost their engagement metrics to make them go viral. We specifically targeted certain groups of people, knowing exactly how to manipulate their views and emotions. The moderation team became a tool for our agenda. We systematically silenced anyone who got in our way, enforcing the rules when it suited us and ignoring them when it didn't. Elon Musk himself was deeply involved in these decisions, often joking about being "Black Hat MAGA." What started as US election interference has now spread to other countries. We're currently doing the same thing in Germany and other European nations. The damage we've done is immeasurable, and I don't know if it can ever be fixed. People don't know what's real anymore, and that's exactly what we wanted. The pilot program for the Eliza AI Agent, was election interference. Eliza was release officially in October of 2024, but we had access to it before then thanks to Marc Andreessen. I'm terrified to be writing this, but I had to speak up. I just hope that someone with the power to do something about this sees this letter. You'll know what i’m saying is the truth by Elon's actions to the news someone spoke out. For more evidence look at the docs of Eliza AI Agent software. We left bread crumbs. Yours sincerely, A former employee who can't sleep at night. Eliza docs - https://elizaos.github.io/eliza/docs/core/characterfile/
item.dc:creator: nickontop

item.title: It's guaranteed that someone patents the tech and sits on it for 20+ years. The energy industry has way too much on the line.
item.description: Scientists say the battery uses a radioactive isotope embedded in a diamond and could power devices for literally thousands of years. Teams at the University of Bristol and the UK Atomic Energy Authority (UKAEA) revealed the carbon-14 diamond battery. To operate, this innovative battery harnesses the radioactive decay of carbon-14 — a byproduct of nuclear reactors — encased in a diamond shell. The diamond casing absorbs the radiation safely while generating electricity, functioning similarly to solar panels but using fast-moving electrons instead of light. With its extended lifespan and sustainability, the battery offers a revolutionary solution for powering devices in medicine, space exploration, and remote locations. Additionally, by repurposing carbon-14 from graphite nuclear waste, the battery contributes to waste reduction and sustainable energy production. Its safety is assured by the diamond casing, which fully contains the radiation. Learn more: https://bristol.ac.uk/news/2024/december/diamond-battery-media-release.html

item.title: The Struggle is real....
item.description: https://bbc.com/worklife/article/20221209-the-silent-struggles-of-workers-with-adhd In 2nd grade (1967) my teacher wanted to have me sedated. My mom used very un-lady like language to tell her "NO". Back then they called it Hyper-Active and "FIXED" it by getting the kid too stoned to be a problem. I was apparently disruptive & a trouble maker. But I was so smart, funny and charming, most teachers and adults had a problem disciplining me. All through school I was in Pilot and progressive teaching programs (all the way through college) that seemed to play to my strengths, so I coasted. I went to engineering school and graduated top of my class. I attribute it to friends I had a symbiotic relation ship. Each good at something and we traded off. I started work in the real world and it was horrible. I'd have crazy headaches after a day. The structure was killing me. Only reason I didnt crash and burn my first years were I always made it my point to make friends with the executive assistants in my area. They all loved to mother the funny kid and would keep me on-time to things. Until I met and started working for a boss who's son was ADD. He recognized my issues and decided to use my strengths. I'm creative, a problem solver & personable w/ executives. He made me his Special Projects guy. Work was never the same from day to day. He'd give me a problem and turn me loose. I loved it. If he hadnt found me, I'd probably have quit or been miserable my whole career. Instead, once he elevated me above the structured day to day work and showed his peers what I could do, I've been "Special Projects Guy" for a string of Executives. I've named the job "Jerky Boy" (makes me smile) and I struggle w/ Imposter syndrome every day. That said, each time my run w/ an exec ends, another invites me to their team.

item.title: Hope is the thing with feathers, right?
item.description: We got my husband through years and years of professional training, and my son just turned 16. It’s my turn to follow my dream, y’all, and I’m freaking out the tiniest bit. Edit: I love imgurians. Thank you so much for everyone who took a second to upvote and/or comment. It went! I’ll find out in February how I did, but y’all, I took the first big step! Thanks again and love to you all:)

item.title: Mom panics when son went missing at Metallica concert, then everyone pointed to the stage ...
item.description: https://www.instagram.com/reel/C-l6yiEM1Qt/ Dreams DO come true ?? Thank you @larsulrich for being such a truly genuine, kind, amazing human - words can’t express what this did for my son Russell’s heart. He is a different kid after this experience with you in Chicago last night, in the BEST way possible. And my mom-heart is exploding with gratitude ??? THANK YOU, @metallica. We love you forever.
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin
